name: Tapjoy
description: Mobile advertising and app monetization platform known for pioneering the offerwall rewarded ad format for mobile games.

seo.title: Tapjoy — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Tapjoy: Mobile advertising and app monetization platform known for pioneering the offerwall rewarded ad format for mobile games.

when_to_use: Offerwall rewarded ad integration for mobile game monetization
Rewarded installs and task-based offers for game publishers
User acquisition via rewarded offer campaigns in mobile games

pros: Iconic offerwall format with strong demand
Now part of Digital Turbine's stack
cons: Competition from Adjoe has eroded dominance
review.verdict: Still the default offerwall choice for many, but Adjoe now wins on rewarded playtime innovation.
review.best_for: Mobile games running a classic rewarded offerwall with proven advertiser demand.
review.not_for: Publishers seeking cutting-edge rewarded playtime or the latest offerwall innovation.
